name: American Game: Tales from the Wild
original_name: American Game: Tales from the Wild
overview: The American landscape and the heritage that shaped us are slowly slipping out of modern life. Most Americans today have never hunted, never fished, never provided for themselves the way their great-grandparents did. This six-part series follows the men who are keeping those traditions alive.

trailers.title: SNEAK PEEK: Tucker on What It’s Like to Hunt With Donald Trump Jr.
